common.tapSetHome: Tap to set your home location

auth.trustedSubtitle: Trusted baby nanny work — on your schedule
auth.trustLine: Verified nannies · Infant care · Support in English & Hindi
auth.safeData: Your home details stay private and encrypted.
auth.wrongRole: This account is not a parent. Use the Nanny or Coordinator app.

auth.searchPlaceholder: Search your society, street, or area
auth.servantSubtitle: Sign in with the email your coordinator registered. Care for little ones — on your schedule.
auth.servantLoginSubtitle: Sign in with your nanny account. Infant and baby care — on your schedule.
auth.servantJoinSubtitle: Submit your details to apply as a baby nanny.
auth.registrationAgentContact: A coordinator will contact you soon. After verification they will share your password — then you can sign in below.
auth.registrationSuccessBody: Your application was submitted. A BabyCare coordinator will contact you to verify your details and give you login credentials.
auth.alreadyHaveAccount: Already have an account? Sign in
auth.selectSkillsHint: Tap to select one or more skills, then press Done
auth.skillRequired: Please select at least one skill
auth.skillsLoading: Skills are still loading. Please wait.
auth.skillsUnavailable: Skills could not be loaded. Check your connection and try again.
auth.addressRequired: Pick your address on the map or search above
auth.registrationPending: Your application is pending. A coordinator will contact you.
auth.noSelfSignup: No self-signup. Your coordinator creates your account and verifies your ID.
auth.invalidCredentials: Invalid email or password. Use the email and password your coordinator set when onboarding you.
auth.networkLocalhost: Cannot reach the server. On a real phone, set EXPO_PUBLIC_API_BASE_URL in .env to your PC IP (run ipconfig), then restart: npx expo start -c
auth.networkGeneric:
Cannot reach {{base}}

• Backend running? (npm start in Backend)
• Phone on same Wi‑Fi as PC (not mobile data)
• Windows Firewall: allow Node/port 5000
• Restart app after .env change: npx expo start -c

validation.nameMin: Name must be at least 2 characters
validation.passwordMin: Password must be at least 6 characters

workOtp.invalidBody: Enter the 4-digit code from the parent.
workOtp.resentBody: A new code was sent to the parent.
